ordinanceLabel: Dublin Municipal Code (DMC) · Code Publishing · codepublishing.com/CA/Dublin · Local amendments via Ord. 8-25 (2025 code cycle)
fireAgency: Alameda County Fire Department (ACFD) — operating as Dublin Fire Prevention Bureau (contract fire agency) · Plan check via ACFD · ~10 business day turnaround · (925) 833-6650
utility: PG&E (electric + gas) — new construction all-electric only per DMC 7.94.070/7.94.100 (no gas service for new builds) · DSRSD (Dublin San Ramon Services District) for sewer and recycled water — will-serve letter required for all new construction
suggestedQuestions: What are the ADU rules in Dublin under DMC Chapter 8.80?

How do I submit a building permit through Dublin's EnerGov portal?
Is my Dublin property in a WUI or Fire Hazard Severity Zone?
Can I use SolarApp+ for a rooftop solar permit in Dublin?
What is DSRSD and do I need a will-serve letter for my project?
